lastDeploy.summary: Elite 4-week sprint: analytics, SEO landings, deep links, ICS golden tests, webkit E2E, persist flush, print polish
highlights: Doc drift fixed: 56 Vitest unit tests (8 files), 5 Playwright E2E specs
Hook unit tests for useScheduleBootstrap, useScheduleState, useExportPreview
Four new E2E specs: theme-swap, backup-roundtrip, storage-failure-toast, print-preview
App.jsx vertical slices (AppHeader, TaskTable, hooks, schedulePreview)
CI runs lint + unit + E2E on push/PR
Plausible analytics wired via VITE_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN (opt-in, localhost skipped)
recentCommits: 9a4e4a0 feat(bridge): extract App slices and add E2E coverage for optional gates
00715d8 test(bridge-10,22): add unit tests for extracted hooks
481f1b9 docs(bridge-9): map schedule-flow E2E in requirements.json
bd59fb6 docs(bridge-8): sync context.json post-BRIDGE adoption

completed: Public one-page generator SPA deployed to Vercel
Three built-in presets plus save-your-own custom presets
ICS calendar export (core, free forever)
Print-friendly checklist view
Export Preview sidebar (first-occurrence simulation, not a to-do list)
JSON backup and restore with normalization
Theme system with legacy dark-mode migration
Task validation, clamping, and natural-language parsing
Feature-flag infrastructure for monetization (VITE_FEATURE_*)
Monetization catalog in src/config/monetization.js
Brand assets in public/ (logo.png, logo-light.png, favicons, og-image.png, lockscreen SVG)
77 Vitest unit tests across 12 files (lib, hooks, ICS golden, deepLink)
Playwright E2E: 8 specs on chromium + webkit (16 runs)
SEO landing pages: /home-maintenance-calendar, /car-maintenance-schedule-ics, /freelancer-quarterly-tax-reminders
Preset deep links: ?preset=home|gearhead|cfo and ?fresh=1
Persist flush on beforeunload/visibilitychange; export-success monetization card (flagged)
Interest form UI built (modal + footer card) — graceful handling when endpoint unset
Print upsell UI built but feature-flagged off
Owner preview mode (?preview=monetization) for gated UI testing
BRIDGE pre-deploy gate (docs/BRIDGE-GATE.md)
docs/requirements.json acceptance-test traceability with vitest/e2e/manual verify fields
App.jsx vertical slices: AppHeader, TaskTable, useSchedulePersistence, useNotifications, schedulePreview
Hook unit tests: useScheduleBootstrap, useScheduleState, useExportPreview
GitHub Actions CI: lint, unit tests, Playwright E2E on push/PR
Plausible analytics hook (src/lib/analytics.js) — opt-in via VITE_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN
docs/LAUNCH-CHECKLIST.md for domain, Formspree, and analytics setup

blocked.reason: Domain not purchased; production serves from neatclock.vercel.app
VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT not set on production; Formspree/FormSubmit account activation pending
Gumroad products, ZIP deliverables, and VITE_PRINTS_* URLs not created; VITE_FEATURE_NEATCLOCK_PRINTS remains off
Vercel Hobby plan is non-commercial only; upgrade to Pro before enabling live Gumroad print CTAs
VITE_FEATURE_PREMIUM_THEMES off; optional launch tied to print bundle
Flags off; Amazon Associates tag and sponsor outreach not started
VITE_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN not set on production; requires neatclock.app or vercel.app domain decision

nextSession: Purchase neatclock.app and wire via Vercel Domains (see docs/LAUNCH-CHECKLIST.md)
Activate Formspree/FormSubmit endpoint and set VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT on Vercel
Set VITE_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN on Vercel after domain is live
Create Gumroad print pack products and ZIP assets per design-system/BRAND-BRIEF.md
Upgrade Vercel to Pro before enabling live Gumroad print CTAs
